message:
feat: add /api/tasks endpoint to WebServer

- Add projectDataDir option to WebServerOptions interface
- Add /api/tasks route that reads tasks.json from project data dir
- serveTasks() reads ${projectDataDir}/logs/${sessionId}/tasks.json
- Returns { tasks: [] } when dir not set, file missing, or on error
- Pass projectDataDir from env vars at both call sites in cli-interactive
- Uses SPROUT_PROJECT_DATA_DIR ?? SPROUT_GENOME_PATH (matching task-cli pattern)
- Add 4 tests covering: no projectDataDir, missing file, valid file, invalid JSON
